---
title: "Public Consultation"
subtitle: "20 real questions. Three ways to vote. Your voice shapes the living Manifesto."
toc: false
---

**How it works:** each question is a public GitHub ballot. React with 👍 **YES**, 👎 **NO** or 😕
**DEPENDS** — one account, one vote, fully auditable. 💬 Comments in PT/ES/EN are counted and feed
the Manifesto's qualitative section. Non-negotiable axioms are not up for vote — see the
[Manifesto](manifesto.qmd).

```{=html}
<div id="consulta">Loading live results from GitHub…</div>
<script>
(function(){
 var el=document.getElementById("consulta");
 fetch("https://api.github.com/repos/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/issues?labels=consultation&state=open&per_page=100")
 .then(function(r){return r.json()})
 .then(function(list){
   if(!Array.isArray(list)||!list.length){el.innerHTML="Live results unavailable — vote on <a href='https://github.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/issues?q=label%3Aconsultation'>GitHub</a>.";return;}
   list.sort(function(a,b){return a.title<b.title?-1:1});
   var h="";
   list.forEach(function(is){
     var rx=is.reactions||{}, y=rx["+1"]||0, n=rx["-1"]||0, d=rx.confused||0, t=y+n+d, c=is.comments||0;
     var py=t?100*y/t:0, pd=t?100*d/t:0, pn=t?100*n/t:0;
     h+='<div style="border:1px solid #d0d4dc;border-radius:8px;padding:.9rem;margin:.6rem 0">'
       +'<div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.45rem">'+is.title+'</div>'
       +'<div style="display:flex;background:#eee;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;height:14px">'
       +'<div style="width:'+py+'%;background:#1f2a44"></div>'
       +'<div style="width:'+pd+'%;background:#b8b8b8"></div>'
       +'<div style="width:'+pn+'%;background:#8a1f1f"></div></div>'
       +'<div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#555;margin-top:.35rem">👍 '+y+' · 😕 '+d+' · 👎 '+n+' · '+t+' votes · 💬 '+c
       +' — <a href="'+is.html_url+'">vote &amp; comment</a></div></div>';
   });
   el.innerHTML=h;
 })
 .catch(function(){el.innerHTML="Live results unavailable — vote on <a href='https://github.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/issues?q=label%3Aconsultation'>GitHub</a>.";});
})();
</script>
```
